2026-0386
2026-04-29CIRCFirst Nations Fiscal Management ActReappointment of a director of the Board of Directors of the First Nations Financial Management BoardReappointment of Dillon Johnson of Powell River, British Columbia, as a director of the Board of Directors of the First Nations Financial Management Board, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of two years, effective October 17, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a director of the Board of Directors of the First Nations Financial Management Board
precis: Reappointment of Dillon Johnson of Powell River, British Columbia, as a director of the Board of Directors of the First Nations Financial Management Board, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of two years, effective October 17, 2026.
